title: erigeron acris var. racemosus
intro: Erigeron acris var. racemosus, also known as the tall fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Erigeron acris var. racemosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
